message:
test(bd-3vvu): add unit tests for router.rs handler dispatch and edge cases

Cover handle_tools_call, handle_resources_read, handle_prompts_get with
session-disabled, budget-exhausted, success, and not-found scenarios.
Also test template-based resource duplicate behaviors, mount conflict
warnings, invalid cursor handling, and page size edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
